MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF LINDY WARD'S Motion To Transfer Action is continued to June 4, 2015. Plaintiff shall serve the motion on all parties that have appeared in the case at least 16 court days in advance of the new hearing date. Any opposition and reply to the motion shall be filed pursuant to CCP sec. 1005(b) contemplating the new hearing date.
